Daemon._comment: Dev runs the Web standalone (no daemon on the Unix socket). Enabled=false flips both DaemonClient registration and the TOTP cipher back to the in-process AesGcmTotpSecretCipher. The cipher auto-generates an ephemeral master key when NETFIREWALL_MASTER_KEY is unset in Development, so TOTP secrets stored in this run become unrecoverable on restart — fine for dev. Set NETFIREWALL_MASTER_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 32) to persist across restarts.
